note: Daily Instagram carousels at 19:00 ET. Rebuild with tools/build_manifest.py after adding to carousels.json.

posts.caption:
Your next patient asks AI before they ever call you.

They type "best plastic surgeon near me" into ChatGPT or Gemini, and it hands them a short list — before they visit a single website. If you're not on it, you're out before the race starts.

Try it yourself: ask ChatGPT who the best surgeon in your city is, and see whose names come up.

#plasticsurgeon #aisearch #chatgpt #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #medicalmarketing #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: The decision starts inside an AI answer now — not on Google's results page. Most practices have never once checked what that answer says about them.

posts.caption:
What does AI actually weigh before recommending a surgeon?

Mostly three things: your Google profile + reviews, the trusted third-party sites (RealSelf, "best of" lists, press), and how clearly your own pages are written.

Notice what's near the bottom: how expensive your website looks. Substance beats polish here.

#plasticsurgeon #medicalmarketing #aisearch #chatgpt #reviews #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: If you're strong on reviews but thin on structured pages (or vice versa), that imbalance is usually why AI skips you.

posts.caption:
SEO gets you found. AEO gets you chosen.

SEO is about ranking in a list of links and letting the patient choose. AEO is about whether ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity name and recommend you when someone asks who to hire.

You can sit at #3 on Google and be completely absent from every AI answer — I see it weekly.

#plasticsurgeon #seo #aisearch #chatgpt #medicalmarketing #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: The practices treating these as one job are the ones getting left out of the conversation that now happens before anyone visits a website.

posts.caption:
When AI hands a patient a name and it isn't yours, it's rarely about skill.

Usually the competitor just has three things you can build: fresher reviews, a presence on the sites AI trusts, and pages clear enough for AI to quote.

It's a visibility gap, and it closes.

#plasticsurgeon #medspa #aisearch #chatgpt #cosmeticsurgery #medicalmarketing #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: The competitor being recommended is basically showing you the checklist — it's what "good" looks like to the AI right now.

posts.caption:
Reviews stopped being just a trust badge — they're now a signal AI uses to decide who to recommend.

And it's not only your star rating. Recency matters: a wall of glowing reviews from three years ago can lose to a competitor collecting a few fresh ones every month.

Keeping reviews flowing is one of the highest-leverage things you can do.

#plasticsurgeon #reviews #aisearch #medicalmarketing #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #chatgpt #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: If your reviews went quiet after a busy stretch, that lull is often exactly when a competitor overtakes you in the AI answer.

posts.caption:
Before AI recommends a surgeon, it checks four places: your website, your Google Business Profile + reviews, the trusted directories and "best of" lists, and press or third-party mentions.

A blank or weak spot in any one is usually why the AI reaches for a competitor instead.

#plasticsurgeon #medicalmarketing #aisearch #chatgpt #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: You don't need all four perfect — but a total blank in one (say, no RealSelf presence) is often the single thing holding you back.

posts.caption:
If AI never quotes your site, it's often because your pages are hard to lift from.

A single wall of text is tough for an engine to pull a clean answer out of. What it grabs easily: clear headings that match how people ask, short paragraphs, and FAQ blocks — pre-packaged answers it can reuse.

#plasticsurgeon #medicalmarketing #aisearch #chatgpt #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: An FAQ block answering the real questions patients ask is one of the fastest ways to start getting cited.

posts.caption:
The hardest part of being invisible to AI is that it's silent.

Every "best surgeon near me" query is a patient making a decision — and there's no page two in an AI answer. You're either named or invisible. When you're left out, no lead form goes unfilled that you'd notice; the patient simply never knew you existed.

You can't fix a leak you can't see.

#plasticsurgeon #aisearch #chatgpt #medicalmarketing #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: This is what makes it dangerous — there's no bounce rate, no failed form, no signal. Just patients quietly routed elsewhere.

posts.caption:
We don't guarantee you'll rank #1 in AI answers. Anyone who does is guessing.

AI engines are non-deterministic and change constantly — no vendor controls them. What we promise instead: a structured operating model that improves how AI reads, trusts and recommends you, measured directionally and tracked month over month.

No magic. No autopilot.

#plasticsurgeon #aisearch #marketing #medicalmarketing #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: If a vendor promises guaranteed AI rankings, that's the moment to keep your wallet closed.

posts.caption:
Want to know if AI recommends you? Two ways, both free.

Quick version: open ChatGPT and ask the exact question a patient would — "who's the best surgeon in [your city]?" — and see if your name comes up.

Thorough version: run the full scan across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and Claude, and get a founder-reviewed breakdown of why.

#plasticsurgeon #aisearch #chatgpt #medicalmarketing #medspa #cosmeticsurgery #theaeoloop
posts.firstComment: Try the quick version right now — it takes 30 seconds and it's usually the moment practices realize they have a gap.
